title: Realistic Rain
description: A long-time resource pack developed to reimagine the Minecraft rain sound effects and textures.
body:
# Realistic Rain
## Reimagine Minecraft Rain
Completely replaces all of the Minecraft rain sounds, adds 21 new thunder sounds, and changes the rain and splash textures to be less annoying and more realistic! A wonderful addition to your game if you like the calming effects of rain, and pairs very nicely with chill lofi background music.

## Update Notice
If it says "Incompatible Version," it probably still works. Mojang rarely changes weather in Minecraft. Versions I know that are compatible include:
- 1.21.x
- 1.20.x
- 1.19.x

<iframe allowfullscreen="allowfullscreen" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/AdCsCUP5D1w"></iframe>
